target: 2. Those Who Can't Say It, Those Who Do Say It
Mio, I'm sorry for making you wait.
Ah, Tokiko.
Wait, Sou too?

Hey, Mio!
What a great night!
I'm sorry for rushing in.

It's fine.
Since you came all the way here…

But if you'd told me the location,
I could've gone there myself.
I called you, so it's only natural I should come.
But why is Sou here too?

My older brother was eavesdropping on our call
and followed us.
Huh?!
Oh, really?

I-I just happened to hear it!
Eavesdropping? That's not something I'd do!

Besides, it's dangerous to let Mio walk around at night.
I thought it'd be safer if I was here…
You worry about me, yet you say that?

I-I didn't mean it like that!
I was really worrying about you…

Alright, alright.
Older brother, just shut up.
This conversation's getting complicated.
Yeah, what did you want to talk about?

Ah… okay.
Let's walk while we talk.
Yeah, it's fine with me.
Actually, Shinpei…
Hey, Mio!

If you have a problem, I'll listen!
So just tell me anything!
Huh? What's going on all of a sudden?
Older brother… didn't I tell you to be quiet?
S-Sorry… I just couldn't help it!

If you say I'm troubled…
I'm not really troubled at all.

You know, today Shinpei asked me.
He said he noticed something was off with you…
Did something happen?
Huh, Shinpei?
Yeah, there was a message from Tokiko.

By the way, my older brother found out because
he snooped on my messages.

I-I just happened to see it!
Snooping? That's not something I'd do!

Can something that happens twice in a day really be
just a coincidence?
(Shinpei sent a message to Tokiko…)
(Have I been acting so different lately?)

(Well, at least…
Shinpei saw it that way.)

Hey, Mio.
Is the problem about Shinpei?

Older brother!! 
Why'd you say that all of a sudden?!

I only throw straight pitches.
That's my specialty.
Stop making up excuses!
It's fine, Tokiko.
Mio…
Actually, I think Sou's pretty amazing.

No matter how hard it is to say,
you can say it when it's time.
Thanks, Mio.
Well, since Sou said it…
I guess it was about Shinpei after all.

Mio, I'll say it again.
If you have something to talk about,
just tell me anything.

Tell me everything,
and you'll feel better.

Of course,
I won't tell Shinpei a thing.
Yeah… thanks.

It looks like we'll need more time.
Let's go to the beach and talk.

Right on!
Just tell me anything, Mio!
I'll definitely listen!
Yeah…

Wait a second.
Older brother, you should go over there.

W-Why?!
I was also going to talk…

Please!
Just for a little while.
Ah, okay…
I feel bad for Sou…
But this way, it's easier for you, right?
Y-Yeah…

Then let's continue.
Tell me everything you can.

Tokiko… when Shinpei left for Tokyo,
you had a fight and broke up, right?

I know that.
You've been in a cold war ever since.
That's right.

Even though Shinpei came back,
my sister still said this morning,
"I'll hit him if I see him."

I haven't seen the two of them fight,
and I wanted them to make up…

When I saw them talking happily,
I felt relieved,
and I was happy.

But… why?
Even though I should be happy,
my chest feels all fluttery.
That's probably…
Yeah, I think I'm jealous of my sister.
I…

I think I…
like Shinpei.

Mio… you've finally been honest
with your own feelings.
Yeah… I guess so.
H-Hey, Sou!

Older brother…!
Did you hear that?

Sorry… I thought you were thirsty,
so I went to get a drink.
It looks like I came back at a bad time.
That's why I told you to go over there…

Anyway…
Was that really true?
Yeah…

But Shinpei doesn't see me
as anything more than a sister!

Plus, when it's just me and him,
his attitude is completely different
from when it's just my sister and him!

So if I told Shinpei…
how I feel…

It probably wouldn't go anywhere.
He'd still be looking at my sister.

In that case…
it's probably best to just keep things
the way they are.

But then why do I feel…
jealous?

I really like both of them,
but I can't even genuinely support them…
I'm such a bad person.
That's not true at all!
I'll vouch for Mio's good character!

Shhh… your voice is too loud.
What if someone hears?
Ah… sorry.
Hehe…

But… I agree with you.
Mio's a good person.

You know, Mio.
It's not like other people's hearts
look the same from the outside.

I feel happy that Shinpei and Ushio are getting along,
but I also feel a little sad that Ushio treats me differently…
Both of those feelings are genuine.

But if I have such a petty feeling,
I guess I really…
No, it's not like that.

Everyone has feelings they can't show to others.
I do, and so does my older brother.

There's definitely a lot of things
I can't tell anyone!
But having too many would be a problem.
Guh!

Most people ignore inconvenient feelings
and pretend not to notice them.

But Mio's different.
She faces her feelings head-on…
and is trying to find her own answer.
I think that makes her really wonderful.
Of course I think so too!

So Mio.
Believe in yourself more.

Yeah…
Thanks, Tokiko, Sou.
Honestly, talking about it made me feel much better.

I've been thinking about this all day.
That's probably why I looked so down
to Shinpei.

I think I understand Mio's feelings
pretty well.
Huh?

I'm the same too.
No matter how much I think about it, I can't move forward――that's why I'm carrying this feeling.
Hey, could it be… that you have someone you like, Tokiko?
…That face, you have it, don't you?

Huh?!
Tokiko, is that really true?!

I've never heard of such a thing!
Keeping that secret from my older brother――

You're noisy!
Of course I wouldn't tell my older brother.
Even if I told the ceiling's stain, I couldn't tell my older brother.
That's harsh…!

Anyway, why are you still here?
Don't listen in anymore.

You're going to eavesdrop!
Why are you listening in all the way here, and I'm the only one who has to leave?!
…I mean, hey, Tokiko?
You can't be thinking of someone… not Shinpei, right?
…Huh?
Ah… no, of course Shinpei is… a good guy, but!

Don't assume things!
It's not about Shinpei.
S-so, that's the case?!
Then, who is it that Tokiko likes?
For now, it's still a secret from everyone.

Ah~, come on!
Because of my older brother, the conversation went off track.
It's my fault?!
What I wanted to say is that I can understand Mio's feelings.
I also know how painful it is to keep holding onto those feelings without taking a step forward.
But even though I can share the feelings, honestly, I can't give any good advice.
I see… Thank you, Tokiko.
Just knowing that Tokiko understands my feelings makes me happy.

Yeah, me too.
But I can't help much… Sorry.

No, it's fine.
Don't worry about it.

Both of you, look up!
There's nothing to be sad about!
Older brother?

Look well!
I'm going to show you the answer now!
…Answer?
Hey, Mio.
…No, Mio!!
Huh?!

It might not be the right time to say this.
I actually planned to say it during the summer festival.
But if the two of you are worrying about something like this…
As an older brother, as a reliable elder, I should set an example here!
Wait, really…?

Listen carefully, Mio!
I…
I like you! I've liked you for so long!
Eh… um…

Older brother.
Did you forget that you were rejected before?

No, I remember well!
I've been rejected twice already!

But I don't care about that!
What's important is now!
So let me say it again now!

Mio, I can't give up on you!
I want you to look at me only!
But… that kind of thing…
Mio's feelings, I clearly heard them with these ears just now.
Even so, confessing like this might be the height of foolishness.
But I didn't give up easily!
If I stop and stand still, doing nothing and regretting it, the future won't change at all.
That's why I plan to say it again and again.
More importantly, if I don't do this, my feelings for Mio won't settle!
So, Mio! Please listen carefully again!
Mio, I like you! I've liked you for so long!
And from now on too! I'll always love you!
Mizu-kun…
You're really an idiot.
But, an idiot is an idiot, yet he kept thinking about Mio.
Yeah…

Mizu-kun. It reached.
Those words just now… they really hit me.
Huh? Then…!
But, um… I'm sorry.
I guess it didn't work~~!!
That's right.
But… today, I got a lot of courage from Mizu-kun.
I'll try to move forward like Mizu-kun!
Then…
Yeah, I'll try to tell Shinpei my honest feelings.
Mio… chan…

I see, that's good.
It seems I showed my own example.
Mizu-kun… Thank you so much.
I thought I was just a bother, but sometimes I'm useful, huh.
Right? So you can rely on me more.
…Haha, I'll think about it.
Then, I should go back now.
Ah, yeah! I'm sorry for talking so long.

Older brother, wipe your tears quickly.
Mio will be worried.
Gusss… Ah, ah.
Ah, right. Should I walk you home?

No, it's okay.
I want to go back while thinking.
I see… Yeah, I understand.

Bye, Mio.
Be careful on your way back.
Yeah!
(Even if I know it won't go well, there's meaning in moving forward)
(If that's the case, I want to gather the courage to tell Shinpei my feelings)
(It's much better than thinking only about the results and looking gloomy!)
